problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — specifically Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
